feat: AI-proof editing — ast.parse() gate, rollback, structured errors

Pre-write validation: _validate_python_syntax() runs ast.parse() on new
content before _write_and_cache() writes to disk. Broken Python never
reaches the filesystem.

Structured error output: _parse_error_for_agent() converts SyntaxError
into actionable instructions with line numbers, context window, and
caret markers — the LLM can self-correct without re-reading the file.

Rollback on failure: _rollback_edit() restores .bak backup and
invalidates _step_file_cache when validation fails. No half-written
files left behind.

Create file guard: _act_create_file() validates syntax before writing
new .py files, preventing creation of files with broken syntax.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix/performance (#18)

* feat: large image stability & performance overhaul

Replace data URL IPC transport with binary buffers, add file-size and
pixel-count guardrails, move heavy image processing to a Web Worker
with latest-wins cancellation, and introduce progressive two-stage
rendering (fast preview + debounced full-res settle).

- Binary IPC: open/save paths use ArrayBuffer instead of base64 data URLs
- Guardrails: MAX_FILE_BYTES (25 MB) and MAX_PIXELS (40 MP) hard stops
- Worker: off-main-thread blur + threshold via typed-array pipeline
- Progressive: downscaled preview during slider drag, full-res on settle
- Memory: eliminate double image clone on load, lazy FloatingImage render
- Tests: new suites for useImageLoader and useImageProcessingWorker

* fix: make processed image widget fill container area and center image (#17)

The widget container (bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg) now fills the entire
available space (w-full h-full) instead of wrapping tightly around the image.
The image is centered within the widget. Outer padding (p-3) provides breathing
room from viewport edges for floating panels. Both the "no image" and "image
loaded" states share the same widget container with containerRef always attached
for proper ResizeObserver operation.

* fix: restore testng profile activation broken by OS-based jave profiles

Maven deactivates activeByDefault profiles when any other profile is
activated via its <activation> section. The jave-linux-64 OS profile
was triggering this, causing surefire to auto-detect JUnit Platform
instead of TestNG, resulting in 0 tests executed.

Switch testng profile from activeByDefault to property-based activation
(!skipTestNG) which is always active regardless of other profiles.

commit.message:
fix: P95 domain adversarial patient_idx indexing bug

batch.patient_idx is per-graph [B] from PyG batching (scalar attrs are
stacked), NOT per-node [N]. Code was indexing with batch.ptr[gi] (a node
offset) which exceeds tensor size for any graph with >1 node.

Fix: use batch.patient_idx directly + store as torch.tensor for explicitness.

* Fix noisy audio: rebuild Windows DLL with libvgmstream_setup PCM16 output

Previous commit bb7ea19 fixed Linux .so but missed the Windows .dll.
The user was running the old Windows DLL which output float32 (4 bytes/sample),
causing noise when Godot's AudioStreamWAV FORMAT_16_BITS tried to interpret
float bytes as int16.

Both binaries now rebuilt with libvgmstream_setup(force_sfmt=PCM16):
- libgodot_rocksmith.so: 5,376,000 bytes decoded (PCM16 confirmed, was 10,752,000 float32)
- godot_rocksmith.dll: rebuilt with same fix (was never updated after bb7ea19)

Verified on Linux sandbox:
  AudioEngine: decoded 496786 WEM bytes → 5376000 PCM bytes (2 ch, 48000 Hz)
  = 28s × 48000 × 2ch × 2 bytes (PCM16) ✓

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/santzit/go-guitar2/sessions/5adfc328-5224-4897-9f4c-d867421d6d9d

commit.message:
fix: downgrade REQUEST_CHANGES to COMMENT on bot's own PRs (#51)

## Problem

PR #49 review failed with 422 — GitHub doesn't allow `REQUEST_CHANGES`
on your own PR. The bot created #49 via `/implement`, then tried to
review it with `REQUEST_CHANGES`.

## Fix

When reviewing a PR authored by the bot, downgrade `REQUEST_CHANGES` to
`COMMENT`. The feedback still gets posted, it just doesn't block.

---------

commit.message:
fix(copilot): register companion PTY in session store and hide from UI

The hidden companion terminal for agent tabs was not registered in the
session store during init/polling, causing TouchBar key presses to be
silently dropped. Additionally, hidden sessions were added to tabOrder,
making them visible in the side panel and session hub.

- Register companion PTY as hidden session during init and polling loops
  (matching handleNewSessionCreated behavior)
- Exclude hidden sessions from tabOrder in addSession() so they never
  appear in tabs, side panel, or session hub
- Prevent hidden sessions from becoming activeId automatically

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use MYSQL_PWD env var instead of .cnf file for MySQL passwords

MySQL .cnf files don't properly handle passwords with % characters
even when quoted, as % is treated as a variable placeholder.
Using MYSQL_PWD environment variable instead, which correctly
handles all special characters while still keeping the password
out of process args (ps aux).

Fixes: #issue-with-special-chars-in-mysql-passwords

subscription sulle proprietà interne del @Model (es. defaultStepsPayload),
perciò FormulaDetailView non si aggiornava dopo il salvataggio.
Cambiato in '@Bindable var formula' per garantire la piena osservabilità.

Made-with: Cursor

* fix: aggiornamento dettaglio ricetta dopo modifica (Query + defaultStepsPayload)

- RecipeFormula: defaultStepsPayload non più private così SwiftData può
  propagare correttamente le notifiche di modifica sul payload degli step
- FormulaLookupView: sostituito fetch one-shot in @State con @Query filtrata
  per id, così FormulaDetailView riceve sempre l'istanza osservata dal
  contesto e si ridisegna dopo save dal foglio modifica

Made-with: Cursor

* fix: simbolo SF valido, refresh dettaglio ricetta, TextEditor senza visual-style spam

- Sostituito loaf.fill (non presente nel set di simboli) con fork.knife
- FormulaDetailView: token di hash sui campi persistiti + .id() sul contenuto
  per forzare il ridisegno dopo modifica (workaround ForEach/step UUID)
- FormulaStepEditorView: rimosso scrollContentBackground(.hidden) sui
  TextEditor; sfondo card con corner radius per ridurre warning UIKit

Made-with: Cursor

* fix: rimuovi .id basato su hash (freeze UI) + refresh solo a chiusura foglio

Il token derivato da Hasher su Double/Data poteva cambiare tra un frame e
l'altro, ricreando il VStack all'infinito e bloccando l'app.

Sostituito con @State detailRefreshToken incrementato solo quando il foglio
modifica ricetta si chiude (wasShowing && !isShowing) o dopo ripristino.

TextEditor: tolto sfondo annidato nel Form; solo scrollContentBackground hidden.
